auth.invalidCredentials: That sign-in didn't work. Check your details and try again.
auth.credentialMismatch: This email is already linked to a different sign-in method. Use the option you signed up with.
auth.providerDisabled: This sign-in option isn't available yet. Try another one.
auth.otpInvalid: That code is wrong or expired. Request a new one and try again.
auth.otpRateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a minute, then try again.
auth.network: Can't reach the sign-in service. Check your connection and try again.
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes, then try again.
auth.userDisabled: This account has been disabled. Contact support.
auth.configError: Sign-in isn't set up correctly. Please contact support.
